name: berth-compiler
description: Create or convert agents into validated Berth packages, verify fidelity, and publish them.

interface.shortDescription: Build, convert, validate, and publish Berth agents.
interface.longDescription: Turn an agent idea or an existing agent project into a Berth package. The plugin inventories capabilities, generates runtime status labels, validates the package, compares behavior for migration fidelity, and publishes to the configured Berth platform.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Berth agent from my requirements.
Convert the agent in this repository into a Berth package.
Validate this Berth package and report migration fidelity.
